description: Radio button for mutually exclusive selections within a group. Group multiple RadioButtons with the same 'group' value.

group.description: Group name — RadioButtons with the same group are mutually exclusive

checked.description: Whether this option is selected by default

dataField.description: DB field to bind selected value to (inside a Form)

notes: Place multiple RadioButtons with the same 'group' string inside a Row or Frame to create a radio group.
